source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Sara says: "My boat has more than one circle. It also has 2 triangles more than squares." Which boat belongs to Sara?
<image1>
extraction_notes: options only contain labels without option text

image_dependency: requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the problem depends primarily on visual content
The question asks which boat matches shape-count conditions, so the boats must be inspected in the image
asset_registry_record.image_manifest shows an existing image file and registry_passed=true
multi_step: The prompt combines at least two constraints: the boat must have more than one circle and have 2 more triangles than squares
Solving requires counting multiple shape types on each candidate boat and checking both conditions jointly
There are 5 answer choices, so the solver likely compares several visual options before selecting one
verifiability: answer_type is choice/option with a single explicit answer_text of 'E'
The constraints are concrete count-based conditions that can be checked directly against the image
asset_registry_record shows answer_present=true, question_present=true, and registry_passed=true
